GC-PDX-001
Portland Traffic Speed
Traffic Speed Observation — Bureau of Transportation
Variable
Definitions
PostedSpeed Posted speed limit at the traffic count location, in miles per hour.
PctOverPosted Percentage of recorded vehicles traveling faster than the posted speed.
PctOverPosted10 Percentage of recorded vehicles traveling at least 10 mph above the posted speed.

Median—

Click a bar to inspect bin.
Source
Portland Bureau of Transportation — Traffic Speed Count Observations.
Data includes 19,357 valid records converted from Web Mercator (EPSG:3857).
